allow: PowerShell($dirs = @\('國文','英文','數學','自然','社會','地理'\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { $files = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File "D:\\Claude\\國中會考\\$d"; Write-Output "=== $d : 共 $\($files.Count\) 個檔案 ==="; $files | Group-Object Extension | Sort-Object Count -Descending | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("  {0} x {1}" -f $_.Name, $_.Count\) } })

PowerShell($word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\("D:\\Claude\\國中會考\\數學\\01.康軒精選題\\第 1 冊\\1-1負數與數線.doc", $false, $true\); $text = $doc.Content.Text; $doc.Close\($false\); $word.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($word\) | Out-Null; $text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2500, $text.Length\)\))

PowerShell($p = "D:\\Claude\\國中會考\\scripts\\extract-docs.ps1"; $c = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\($p, [Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p, $c, \(New-Object Text.UTF8Encoding\($true\)\)\); Write-Output "converted to UTF-8 BOM")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\Claude\\國中會考\\web\\node_modules\\next\\dist\\docs" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; \(Get-Content "D:\\Claude\\國中會考\\web\\package.json" | ConvertFrom-Json\).dependencies)
